title: Leaving Dressrosa — Part 2
description: Luffy’s allies prepare to escape while Fujitora and the Marines make their move.
scene: On pages 9–13, Rebecca, King Riku, Kyros, Sabo, Dressrosa Citizens deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Inside the Palace

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: OH MY! HOW PRETTY! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Girls really do look much better in dresses than suits of armor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: apparently miss scarlet and the prince of a far, far away country fell in love and eloped.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh, by the way, I heard about your father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: left with no other choice, king Riku had to declare that Miss scarlet had passed on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why must we lie!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Because kyros wishes it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Central District

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A prince? From where?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A place with beautiful lakes... that also happened to be in the middle of a war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: trapped by a forbidden love... and the child of that love was Rebecca... I see.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Sadly, it seems the prince died in the war and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: left behind Lady scarlet and Rebecca- I mean, Lady Rebecca.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: to think that they were living on secretly in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Ah, I see... so the Royal Line has been preserved, without taint or blemish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: What strange rumors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Oh! That is manshelly- Dono's flower medicine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Those are quite wonderful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I suspect that they will be especially effective today, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Everyone'll get a turn! Form a line, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Thank you! This medicine works wonders!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Your wounds heal right before your very eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Today, I guess I'll heal this head wound...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Whoa! It healed perfectly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: It really is like magic, isn't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Marine tent

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Ah, I see! It works quite like a blood donation! With these flowers, you can share your healing powers with everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Flutter

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It really is a wonderful fruit, the chiyu-chiyu no mi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Please! Take some from me, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I'll let you take 10 people's worth from me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Oh my, how generous of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Hehehe, don't make me blush! You think I can do 20!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Kyros' house

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Well, they were saying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Rebecca's father was some prince, or some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Rumors of that sort were the talk of the town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: What's Dhat dhupozed thu mhean!? What a weird humor! (What's that sub- posed to mean? What a weird rumor!)

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Blaso Babo beft, Phim Zhad (Also, SABO left! I'm sad...)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Be've Fotta GHo Gater Banji Vand Zhe Bhoters Boo! (We've gotta go after Sanji and the others too!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Rumble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: I don't care if you get mad or cry or hurry or sleep or eat, just choose one!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: One at a time, damn it! Looking at you is giving me a migraine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Rebecca's Dad is soldier-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: You still haven't fully recovered!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Quit stuffing your face and stay asleep, for crying out loud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: I'm the one that started those rumors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: The only people aware of Rebecca's true parents are a few members of the Royal Family and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: The few members of the Donquixote family that investigated them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: the rest of the country only knows of Rebecca's mother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: I preempted the leak of the news of my identity as her father by spreading this rumor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Why?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: I have some skeletons in my closet... and I wasn't exactly raised in the most noblest of fashions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: I'm not cut from the kind of cloth people want to see joining their royal family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: And that's why this is best.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: That's a load of crap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: You think Rebecca knows any of that!? She's probably feelin' like sh-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: I've sent her a letter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: A letter detailing my entire life, as honestly as I could write it.

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
